scheduled_post_title: מס נדל"ן בפיליפינים (Philippine Real Estate Tax Guide for Israelis)
reason_not_published: POST 4 is within the range of posts 3-50 that campaign_state.json holds as drafts under an active MEDIUM blocker ('Future Hebrew community posts need Brand Guard review'). It is not in the executable queue. In addition, the post copy and the current campaign currency rule contradict each other (see currency_conflict), so publishing as-is would breach a live brand rule, and editing the copy is forbidden ('NEVER improvise copy'). Per the run rule, ambiguity means stop and report rather than guess.

blockers_identified.detail: campaign_state.json active blocker: 'Community posts 3-50 are held as drafts because they were authored before the current Israeli currency, CTA, legal ownership, and register rules. Revise and approve each draft through Brand Guard before returning it to the executable queue.' POST 4 falls in this range.

Scheduled-task instructions and CLAUDE.md (Rule 1) require SHEKELS ONLY for Israeli content (Villa D 1,535,000 ש"ח), and POST 4 is denominated in shekels throughout (1,535,000 ש"ח; example 46,000-61,000 ש"ח; VAT threshold 208,000 ש"ח). However campaign_state.json content_rules.israel sets currency to 'PHP_ONLY' with 'pricing_rule':'php_only_all_markets' and explicit note 'Do not show ILS, USD, or daily FX conversions in campaign copy.' The two authoritative sources directly contradict each other on Israeli-market currency.
_queue/community-agent/IMAGE_MAP.md is empty (0 bytes). No image mapping exists for POST 4, so the mapped image cannot be determined without guessing.

campaign_state.json community_agent shows next_post:36 / next_post_date:2026-06-04 and posts_published:2, while calendar.md shows POST 36 already used on Jun 4 and POST 4 due Jun 8. The published-count and next-post pointers are out of sync with the calendar.

currency_conflict.resolution: Unresolved. Requires human / Claude Code decision.

rule_review_of_post_04_if_shekel_rule_ap.note: POST 4 would pass the shekel-based ruleset, but fails the PHP_ONLY ruleset now set in campaign_state.json. This is the core contradiction.

action_taken: No Chrome session opened. No post published. No action taken on the Israeli group. No action taken on BluePrint Building Group. Documented blockers for human / Claude Code review.
recommended_next_action: 1) Resolve the IL currency rule: confirm whether Israeli content is shekels-only (CLAUDE.md/task) or PHP-only (campaign_state.json), and align both sources. 2) Run POST 4 through Brand Guard and return it to the executable queue. 3) Populate IMAGE_MAP.md so a mapped image can be selected. 4) Reconcile community_agent next_post pointer with the calendar.
